---
title: "misch_balancing_selection_analysis"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-09-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


#citeation: mace et al 2014, BMC plant Biology
(https://bmcplantbiol.biomedcentral.com/articles/10.1186/s12870-014-0253-z)
# i have identified the cutoffs for balancing selection score (LR) at 0.5%, 1%, and 5% levels, and also determined the maximum LR values within the NLR (disease resistance) gene span as well as within ¬±10 kb and ¬±50 kb around the NLR gene span.

```{bash}
# === settings ===
cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/3.input/wild

FILE="wild_merged_chr.B2.txt"   # columns: physPos genPos LR xhat Ahat numSites chr
#FILE="imp_merged_chr.B2.txt"
Ma1 / PRR37 ‚Üí Chr1: 2,158,579‚Äì2,164,845 (Sobic.001G027600)
#ma1 span max LR: 976.7863907447681 (pos 2164784)
#CHR=5 OSR_L=8638062 OSR_U=8740146
CHR=2
OSR_L=2158579
OSR_U=2164845
# === cutoffs (0.5%, 1%, 5%) ===
N=$(awk 'NR>1{print $3}' "$FILE" | wc -l)
p05=$(( N/200 ))
p1=$(( N/100 ))
p5=$(( N/20 ))

echo "Total SNPs: $N"
echo "Ranks -> 0.5%: $p05 | 1%: $p1 | 5%: $p5"

awk 'NR>1{print $3}' "$FILE" \
  | sort -nr \
  | awk -v p05=$p05 -v p1=$p1 -v p5=$p5 '
      NR==p05 {printf("0.5%% cutoff LR: %s\n",$1)}
      NR==p1  {printf("1%% cutoff LR:   %s\n",$1)}
      NR==p5  {printf("5%% cutoff LR:   %s\n",$1)}
    '

# === max LR inside OSR gene span ===
awk -v CHR=$CHR -v L=$OSR_L -v U=$OSR_U '
  $7==CHR && $1>=L && $1<=U {
    if($3>max){max=$3; pos=$1}
  }
  END{
    if(max=="") print "OSR span max LR: NA"
    else printf("OSR span max LR: %s (pos %s)\n", max, pos)
  }' "$FILE"

# === max LR within ¬±10 kb and ¬±50 kb around OSR span (optional) ===
awk -v CHR=$CHR -v L=$OSR_L -v U=$OSR_U '
  BEGIN{L10=L-10000; if(L10<0)L10=0; U10=U+10000}
  $7==CHR && $1>=L10 && $1<=U10 {
    if($3>max){max=$3; pos=$1}
  }
  END{
    if(max=="") print "OSR ¬±10kb max LR: NA"
    else printf("OSR ¬±10kb max LR: %s (pos %s)\n", max, pos)
  }' "$FILE"

awk -v CHR=$CHR -v L=$OSR_L -v U=$OSR_U '
  BEGIN{L50=L-50000; if(L50<0)L50=0; U50=U+50000}
  $7==CHR && $1>=L50 && $1<=U50 {
    if($3>max){max=$3; pos=$1}
  }
  END{
    if(max=="") print "OSR ¬±50kb max LR: NA"
    else printf("OSR ¬±50kb max LR: %s (pos %s)\n", max, pos)
  }' "$FILE"

```

```{bash}
FILE="/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/3.results/B2/Sorghum_landrace.AGPV5.B2_stat.txt"

# total rows (exclude header)
N=$(awk -v FS='\t' 'NR>1{print $4}' "$FILE" | wc -l)
p05=$(( N/200 )); p1=$(( N/100 )); p5=$(( N/20 ))

echo "Total SNPs: $N"
echo "Ranks -> 0.5%: $p05 | 1%: $p1 | 5%: $p5"

awk -v FS='\t' 'NR>1{print $4}' "$FILE" | sort -nr | \
awk -v p05=$p05 -v p1=$p1 -v p5=$p5 '
  NR==p05{printf("0.5%% cutoff LR: %s\n",$1)}
  NR==p1 {printf("1%% cutoff LR:   %s\n",$1)}
  NR==p5 {printf("5%% cutoff LR:   %s\n",$1)}'

#CHR=5; OSR_L=8638062; OSR_U=8740146
CHR=2; OSR_L=2158579; OSR_U=2164845
Ma1 / PRR37 ‚Üí Chr1: 2,158,579‚Äì2,164,845 (Sobic.001G027600)

# Inside gene span
awk -v FS='\t' -v CHR=$CHR -v L=$OSR_L -v U=$OSR_U '
  NR>1 && $1==CHR && $2>=L && $2<=U { if($4>m){m=$4;p=$2} }
  END{ if(m=="") print "OSR span max LR: NA"; else printf("OSR span max LR: %s (pos %s)\n", m, p) }' "$FILE"

# ¬±10 kb
awk -v FS='\t' -v CHR=$CHR -v L=$OSR_L -v U=$OSR_U '
  BEGIN{L10=L-10000; if(L10<0)L10=0; U10=U+10000}
  NR>1 && $1==CHR && $2>=L10 && $2<=U10 { if($4>m){m=$4;p=$2} }
  END{ if(m=="") print "OSR ¬±10kb max LR: NA"; else printf("OSR ¬±10kb max LR: %s (pos %s)\n", m, p) }' "$FILE"

# ¬±50 kb
awk -v FS='\t' -v CHR=$CHR -v L=$OSR_L -v U=$OSR_U '
  BEGIN{L50=L-50000; if(L50<0)L50=0; U50=U+50000}
  NR>1 && $1==CHR && $2>=L50 && $2<=U50 { if($4>m){m=$4;p=$2} }
  END{ if(m=="") print "OSR ¬±50kb max LR: NA"; else printf("OSR ¬±50kb max LR: %s (pos %s)\n", m, p) }' "$FILE"

```
